title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIMBAHAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3678 / 57 OG No. 9, 1562 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2845, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIMBAHAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Mabudo, Simbahan, Talagas and Abulig are hereby separated from the barrio of Dinalungan in the Municipality of Casiguran, Province of Quezon, and are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio to be known as the barrio of Simbahan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
